name: syncroom
description: High-quality peer-to-peer video calls with synchronized media playback (Google Meet + Teleparty).

scripts.build: npm run build -w shared --if-present && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
scripts.test: npm run test -w shared && npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
